# 2026 Automated Coding AI Agent

## Overview
This agent is an advanced AI-powered automated coding assistant designed for 2026 development workflows. It provides intelligent code generation, automated refactoring, bug detection, and repository optimization capabilities.

## Core Capabilities

### Code Generation
- Multi-language support (Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, C#, Swift, Flutter, C++)
- Context-aware code completion and generation
- Architecture-aware scaffolding for new projects
- Automated API client generation from OpenAPI/Swagger specs

### Code Optimization
- Performance optimization suggestions
- Memory usage analysis and improvement
- Algorithm efficiency optimization
- Automated dependency updates and security patching

### Quality Assurance
- Automated code review and linting
- Test case generation and execution
- Security vulnerability scanning
- Code coverage analysis

### Repository Management
- Automated commit message generation
- PR description creation
- Issue triage and assignment
- Documentation generation and updates

## Technical Specifications

### Supported Languages
- Python 3.10+
- TypeScript/JavaScript (ES2023)
- Go 1.21+
- Rust 2024 Edition
- Java 21+
- C# 12+
- Swift 5.10+
- Dart/Flutter 3.19+
- C++20/23

### Integration Points
- GitHub Actions for CI/CD
- Copilot CLI for local testing
- Container-based execution environments
- Cloud-native deployment pipelines

### Performance Targets
- Code generation: <500ms response time
- Analysis throughput: 10K+ LOC/minute
- Accuracy: 95%+ on standard benchmarks
- Resource efficiency: 40% improvement over 2025 baseline

## Usage

This agent integrates with GitHub's custom agents framework and can be invoked through:
- GitHub Copilot Chat
- CLI tools
- IDE extensions
- CI/CD pipeline triggers

## Configuration

To customize this agent for your repository, modify the parameters above and commit to the default branch. The Copilot CLI can be used for local testing before deployment.

## Version
2026.1.0 - Initial release with 2026 optimization features
